prompt: A clean, minimal, modern 2D rounded rectangle play button sprite for a mobile puzzle game. Perfect square format. Rounded rectangle button shape with a neutral white-to-light-gray color base (completely grayscaled/white so it can be tinted in Unity UI). Features a bold, crisp, centered gray triangle play icon. Smooth polished surface with a subtle elegant drop shadow underneath. Clean flat vector style, highly readable, centered composition. Transparent background.
